title: IIPS Notification 2026 - Apply for 02 Professor Posts
description: International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) has issued the official notification for 2026. To fill the vacancies for 02 Professor Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in post-graduation can grab this chance and apply for the IIPS Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply before the last date of application. If you are ...
